state.dockText: ProjectMediaRecordScopesAICaptionsReframeOutputMedia0Your imported files will live here. Drag one in or click Import.Beat DetectionImport some audio to detect beats.
modalText: Auto Captions (Experimental)All speech recognition runs on this device (Whisper via ONNX Runtime Web). No audio leaves your browser. No cloud API.ModelChoose a modelWhisper Base (ONNX, int8)Whisper Tiny (ONNX, int8)Whisper Base (ONNX, int8)Multilingual (~74M params), int8-quantized — best balance of size and accuracy.OpenAI · onnx-community · Apache-2.0 / MIT · 77.3 MB · Learn more ↗EngineDetected engineONNX Whisper (WASM)On-device Whisper runs through ONNX Runtime Web. The shipped int8 models use ORT-WASM; the first run downloads the selected model once, then caches it for offline reuse.Model statusnot-loadedModel size—Last transcription—LanguageAuto-detectChinese (zh)English (en)ClipSelect a clip on the timeline to transcribe.ActionsLoad modelTranscribe selected clipTranscribe timeline rangeCancelModel: Whisper (MIT, OpenAI) run on-device by ONNX Runtime Web. Assets load from this app's own origin only after you click "Load model".
